titleStmt.title: SII 34.147: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 147. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the central shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Vīra-Narasiṁha Bhujabalarāya-Mahārāya, Śaka 1428, Kshaya, Karkaṭaka, badi 12, Friday = A.D. 1506, July 17, Friday.

The king is evidently Vīra-Narasimha, elder son of Narasā-nāyaka and first king of the Tuḷuva dynasty. Gift of gold by a Deyvachchilai Iṟatinagirinātar for a lamp, for bringing water from the Kāvēri river for the sacred bath of the deity of Tirumāṇikkamalai temple and for other offerings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīra narasiṅhabhujabalarāya mahārāyakkuc cellā
niṉṟa cakābtam 1000 4 100 2 10 8 Atiṉmēṟ cellā niṉṟa kṣayasam
vatsarattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu kruṣṇa pakṣattu dvādaśiyum peṟ
ṟa cukkiṟavārattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭai
ya tampirāṉārku kaṭṭaḷai tevvaccilai Iṟatiṉa
kirinātar Upaiyammāka ku
ṭutta pon_ 2 10 Ippoṉ Irupa
tukkum kālacantiyil ku
ṟuṇi Ammutum Oru cantiyā
tīpam Orukuṭam kāvēri tiru
mañcaṉamum cantiṟāti
ttiya varaiyum naṭatta ka
ṭavōmākavum Ituk
ku tēvakanmiyaṟōm §
Digital edition of SII 34.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
